title: Cirrus: pick UIDs/GIDs starting at 1500, not 1000
body:
Reason: looks like UIDs 1001, 1003, 1006 are already taken
in the CI VMs.

Fixes: #15573

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```
